name: Grilled Vegetable Kebabs with Grilled Lemon Dressing
description: Portobello, zucchini, and pepper skewers grilled alongside lemon halves, then dressed with the charred-lemon vinaigrette — the veg for the grill night.
recipeIngredient: 2 zucchini, halved lengthwise and sliced 3/4-inch thick
2 red bell peppers, stemmed/seeded, cut into 1.5-inch pieces
recipeInstructions: Whisk the oil, mustard, rosemary, garlic, 1/2 tsp salt, and 1/4 tsp pepper; reserve half the dressing for serving. Toss the mushrooms, zucchini, and peppers with the rest and thread onto eight 12-inch metal skewers.
Grill the kebabs and the lemon quarters over medium-high, turning, until the vegetables are tender and well browned and the lemons are charred, ~16-18 min.
Transfer to a platter; squeeze 2 grilled lemon quarters into the reserved dressing, whisk, and drizzle over. Serve with the remaining lemons.
author: America's Test Kitchen

ai.cliffNotes: Portobello, zucchini, and pepper skewers grilled alongside lemon halves, then dressed with the charred-lemon vinaigrette — the veg for the grill night.
keyTips: Make the vegetables the star - meaty portobello + zucchini + bell pepper give varied textures, not just filler.
Grill the lemon quarters: charring mellows and concentrates the juice for the finishing dressing.
Dress lightly before grilling and again after for bold, balanced flavor.
